idea-plugin.name: Pytest Fixture Navigator
idea-plugin.description:
Instantly search and jump to any @pytest.fixture definition across your entire project.

Features

  • Searchable popup listing all fixtures found in test_*.py and conftest.py files
  • Filter simultaneously by fixture name and file path
  • Browse button to narrow results to a specific folder
  • Inline code preview with syntax highlighting, centered on the fixture definition
  • Multiple selection — open several fixtures at once
  • Sort by fixture name or by file path
  • Right-click any folder in the Project tree → Open Fixture Navigator Here
  • Pre-fills the name filter from selected text in the editor
  • Automatic index refresh — updates in the background whenever a test file changes

Usage

Press Cmd+Shift+F (macOS) or Ctrl+Shift+F (Linux/Windows), or go to Navigate → Open Fixture Navigator. Use arrow keys to browse, Enter or F4 to jump to the definition, double-click to open. Shortcut can be changed in Settings → Keymap → Pytest Fixture Navigator.

action.description: Show a searchable list of all @pytest.fixture functions in test_*.py and conftest.py files
Show fixtures under the selected folder
